历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 10723 → 16328 → 13712 → 10190 → 9528, with significant fluctuations. In 2022, due to a gap, the ranking dropped sharply to 16328, then gradually recovered in subsequent years, reaching 9528 in 2025, the best in the past five years. Over the past three years, the ranking has moved forward by about 3780 places, with a baseline of approximately 9528 in 2025. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 13 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 2 in 2024, and 2 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction before stabilizing. In 2026 (§ 7), the plan is 4 students, doubling from 2025, significantly easing competition pressure, and the ranking number should noticeably move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, approximately 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026, with a slight upward trend in recent years, placing it around the top 200 nationally. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety and volleyball match controversies, which may partially dampen some candidates' enthusiasm for applying. On Douyin, it ranks 18th in popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention. However, as a top sports university, its sports disciplines are widely recognized as leading.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of sports-related majors is stable. In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in the province is about 79,970, a slight decrease of about 0.56% from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, and candidates from Jilin Province need to consider regional preferences when applying to universities in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 9528 in 2025, the doubling of the science group enrollment plan in 2026 (2→4 people) significantly easing competition, a slight decrease in provincial physics category candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation; taking into account the large expansion but the negative reputation may partially offset the heat, after a small correction, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15195, with a range of 14695–15695.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 14600), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (outside 15600), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.
